CVE-2020-36330.title: A flaw was found in libwebp in versions before 1.0.1. An out-of-b ...
CVE-2020-36330.description: A flaw was found in libwebp in versions before 1.0.1. An out-of-bounds read was found in function ChunkVerifyAndAssign. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to data confidentiality and to the service availability.

CVE-2020-36331.title: A flaw was found in libwebp in versions before 1.0.1. An out-of-b ...
CVE-2020-36331.description: A flaw was found in libwebp in versions before 1.0.1. An out-of-bounds read was found in function ChunkAssignData. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to data confidentiality and to the service availability.

CVE-2020-36332.title: A flaw was found in libwebp in versions before 1.0.1. When readin ...
CVE-2020-36332.description: A flaw was found in libwebp in versions before 1.0.1. When reading a file libwebp allocates an excessive amount of memory. The highest threat from this vulnerability is to the service availability.

CVE-2023-1999.title: There exists a use after free/double free in libwebp. An attacker ...
CVE-2023-1999.description: There exists a use after free/double free in libwebp. An attacker can use the ApplyFiltersAndEncode() function and loop through to free best.bw and assign best = trial pointer. The second loop will then return 0 because of an Out of memory error in VP8 encoder, the pointer is still assigned to trial and the AddressSanitizer will attempt a double free.

CVE-2023-4863.title: Heap buffer overflow in libwebp in Google Chrome prior to 116.0.5 ...
CVE-2023-4863.description: Heap buffer overflow in libwebp in Google Chrome prior to 116.0.5845.187 and libwebp 1.3.2 allowed a remote attacker to perform an out of bounds memory write via a crafted HTML page. (Chromium security severity: Critical)
